name: Sarah M.
text: MTC Renovations transformed our basement into a beautiful living space. Professional, on time, and on budget. Highly recommend!

name: David K.
text: Our kitchen renovation exceeded expectations. The team was meticulous with every detail, from the cabinets to the countertops.

name: Lisa P.
text: Had our bathroom completely redone. Walk-in shower, new tile, vanity — everything looks amazing. MTC made the process stress-free.

name: James R.
text: New hardwood floors throughout the main level. The crew was clean, efficient, and the finish is flawless.

name: Amanda T.
text: Whole house interior paint job. They prepped everything perfectly and the results are stunning. Will use MTC again for sure.

name: Nicole F.
text: MTC completely gutted and rebuilt our main bathroom. New walk-in shower, heated floors, and custom vanity. It looks like something out of a magazine. The crew was tidy and respectful the entire time.

name: Robert C.
text: From the initial quote to the final walkthrough, everything was handled professionally. Our new kitchen is exactly what we envisioned — open concept with quartz counters and custom cabinetry. Couldn't be happier.

name: Patricia M.
text: We finally finished our basement after years of putting it off. MTC handled the whole thing — framing, drywall, flooring, pot lights. It's now our favourite room in the house. Great communication throughout.
